data.title: A Qi Aoyou Ji
data.synopsis:
On Chicken Island, there lives an assassin named Wu Liuqi. Through a series of coincidences, Wu Liuqi is forced to travel to various parallel universes to carry out missions. However, during these missions, he gradually discovers that a mysterious force is slowly threatening Chicken Island. Therefore, he decides to uncover the mastermind and protect Chicken Island!

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

data.title: Xiaolan He Ta De Pengyou
data.synopsis:
The famous meme is actually a funny guy? As the protagonist, Xiao Lan and his friends: the cunning Xiao Zi, the gluttonous G Pang, and the passionate Xiao Hong, together stage the comedy of life. The seemingly ordinary group of four can actually create an unusually bright spark when they come together. The ordinary life is constantly unfolding unexpected plots. Because of this, Xiao Lan and his friends will be more positive in facing each day!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Tying the Knot with an Amagami Sister

data.title: Amagami-san Chi no Enmusubi
data.title_english: Tying the Knot with an Amagami Sister
data.synopsis:
After witnessing his mother's death at a young age, Uryuu Kamihate grew up disillusioned with the gods, dismissing faith in them as utter nonsense. Due to his beliefs, he aims to become a doctor, spending most of his time studying to enter the prestigious Kyoto University.

To further his studies, Uryuu searches for a new place to take him in and get away from the noisy environment of the orphanage where he grew up. Chidori Amagami, head priest of the Amagami Shrine, allows him to stay at the Amagami residence. However, Uryuu has to live there with Chidori's three granddaughters—Yae, Yuna, and Asahi—who serve as shrine maidens. Moreover, Chidori has another condition for Uryuu: he has to marry one of the sisters to ensure the shrine's future and one day inherit it. But with Uryuu's goals and outlook naturally clashing against the sisters' beliefs, this already daunting ordeal seems outright impossible.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
